steps.title: Count the number of doublings
steps.content: From 1700 to 1820 is $1820-1700=120$ years. With doubling every 30 years, the count is $\tfrac{120}{30}=4$ doublings.

steps.title: Solve for the initial population
steps.content: Let $P_0$ be the 1700 population. Then $P_0\cdot 2^4=272{,}000$. $$P_0=\frac{272{,}000}{16}=17{,}000.$$ Dividing by $16$ reverses the four doublings. That confirms A is correct.
